description: Add E2E tests for search interaction details: filtering installed plugins by tool name/description, 'No results' empty state, search clear button, and the Installed section header during search.

userStories.title: E2E test: search filters installed plugins by tool name and description
userStories.description: Test that typing a tool name in the search bar filters the installed plugin list to show only plugins with matching tools, and shows the 'Installed' section header.
acceptanceCriteria: Typing a tool name (e.g., 'echo') filters to show only the e2e-test plugin
The 'Installed' section header appears above the filtered results
Plugins that don't match the filter are hidden
Clearing the search shows all plugins again

userStories.title: E2E test: 'No results' empty state when search matches nothing
userStories.description: Test that searching for a string that matches no installed plugins and no npm results shows the 'No results' message.
acceptanceCriteria: Typing a nonsense string (e.g., 'xyzzy99nonexistent') in the search bar
After the npm search completes (loading spinner finishes), 'No results' text appears
No Installed or Available section headers are shown

userStories.title: E2E test: search clear button (X) clears the search and returns to default view
userStories.description: Test that clicking the X button in the search bar clears the search query and returns to the default plugin list view.
acceptanceCriteria: Type a search query — search results appear
Click the X clear button — search bar clears
The default plugin list view returns (no Installed/Available headers)
The clear button has aria-label 'Clear search'
